events.title: ShinyHunters → Anodot → Snowflake supply-chain credential breach
events.reviewer_expertise: Snowflake expertise from working as an enterprise data scientist with Snowflake
events.summary: In April 2026 the extortion group ShinyHunters compromised Anodot (an AI business-analytics / anomaly-detection SaaS) and harvested the OAuth/API tokens Anodot uses to query its customers' cloud data warehouses. Using those legitimate, t…

events.title: TeamPCP / Shai-Hulud software-supply-chain worm
events.vector: npm / PyPI package poisoning via hijacked CI/CD pipelines (TanStack→OpenAI, Bitwarden CLI, Checkmarx, elementary-data); OIDC-token extraction + trojanized releases.

events.title: EvilTokens / Kali365 phishing-as-a-service
events.vector: Device-code auth abuse harvesting persistent OAuth refresh tokens; 340+ Microsoft 365 orgs; tokens survive password resets and MFA.

events.title: Azure Databricks SSRF — CVE-2026-33107 (CVSS 10.0)
events.vector: Unauthenticated remote SSRF → internal metadata access → privilege escalation into enterprise data lakes. A vulnerability, not yet a confirmed exploitation event.

events.title: ShinyHunters 2026 multi-vector extortion spree
events.vector: The broader campaign behind the Anodot breach — Cisco, TELUS, Instructure, McGraw Hill, Carnival, Vercel — each a distinct vector; tracked as false alarms in the Anodot report.
